summary: Frontend-only verification of Dhikr/Tasbih layout fix on /dhikr. Bug fix is VERIFIED: preset chips render as short horizontal pills with fixed height of 40pt at y=792 (bottom of screen, mobile 390x844), no vertical stretching, no overlap with the tap counter. Counter increments correctly (0->1->2->3), preset switching updates Arabic/transliteration/translation and loads the persisted count for that dhikr, reset button clears the count, back button is wired to router.back(). Theme toggle from the menu drawer (testID theme-light / theme-dark) correctly switches the Dhikr screen between dark and light palettes via useTheme(). Regression sweep on Home, Quran list (surah-N items), Quran detail (reciter-toggle + play-all-btn + per-ayah play-N), Favourites, Articles, Emotions, and Reminder screens all render and respond to navigation without errors.

issues: The 'salawat' preset chip is ~233px wide because its transliteration 'Allahumma salli ala Muhammad' is long; still a single 40pt pill so it is acceptable, but main agent may consider shortening the displayed label to keep all chips visually consistent.

action_items: No code action required for the reported Dhikr layout bug — fix verified working.
OPTIONAL polish: shorten the Salawat chip label (e.g. 'Salawat' instead of 'Allahumma salli ala Muhammad') so all preset chips have a similar width.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/dhikr.tsx is small, focused, uses StyleSheet.create, wraps all text in Text, uses TouchableOpacity/Pressable with testIDs, and respects useTheme() — clean implementation.
Counter persistence relies on /src/storage which was not modified; behaved correctly during preset switching (count loaded from persisted state).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dhikr layout regression already fixed and verified at viewport 390x844. Preset chips have height: 40, wrap: 64; tap counter is the central ring (testID tasbih-tap). Theme toggle testIDs in drawer are theme-light and theme-dark. Quran detail has testID reciter-toggle and play-all-btn.
rca_of_issue: Original bug: preset chips stretched vertically and overlapped tap counter. Root cause was the absence of fixed height/flexShrink on Pressable chips inside a flex parent, causing them to expand to fill remaining vertical space. Fix in /app/frontend/app/dhikr.tsx wraps the chip ScrollView in a fixed-height container (presetWrap height 64, paddingVertical 8) and gives each chip an explicit height of 40 with flexShrink: 0 and gap-based spacing. Verified: chip bounding boxes report height=40 and y=792 across all 6+ presets.
